title: 50 Years on, Liberals Choose the Future [Promoted Content]
summary_full: For too long, Europeans have been told to fear what comes next. Liberals see it differently: the future is not something to fear, but something we can create together. While some are afraid of change or difference, we’ve kept on making the case for openness, diversity and freedom. Because we know it makes us stronger. […]
